curation_notes: The patch fixes incorrect error code checking in _decodeStripYCbCr in src/libImaging/TiffDecode.c. TIFFRGBAImageGet returns 0 on failure, but the pre-patch code compared the return value against -1, which never matched. This caused decode errors to go undetected, leading to a heap-based buffer overflow. The advisory notes this is an incomplete fix for CVE-2020-35654. Only one non-test source file was modified. No sibling files call TIFFRGBAImageGet. The pre-assigned class buffer-overflow (CWE-787) is correct.
